objective: Implement a fork-only hotfix and hardening set that prevents AsyncEngineArgs version-compat crashes and makes optional RunPod preset unset semantics explicit.
scope: Apply minimal, reversible changes in this fork only to src/engine_args.py, .runpod/hub.json, scripts/config_doctor.py, docs/runtime-compatibility.md, README.md, and aiwf.request.json. Ensure profile defaults only apply keys that exist in AsyncEngineArgs, switch optional preset override defaults to explicit 'None', document vLLM compatibility behavior and deployment checks, and add config_doctor warnings/errors for invalid optional override values and LANGUAGE_MODEL_ONLY compatibility risk.
acceptance_criteria: src/engine_args.py gates profile default application by AsyncEngineArgs.__dataclass_fields__ so unsupported fields (for example language_model_only on older vLLM) are skipped instead of causing AsyncEngineArgs initialization failures.
.runpod/hub.json presets use explicit string 'None' for NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE, MAX_CPU_LORAS, and MAX_PARALLEL_LOADING_WORKERS.

scripts/config_doctor.py errors when the three optional override keys are set to literal 0 and warns when values are neither unset sentinels ('', 'None', 'none') nor positive integers; it also warns when presets enable LANGUAGE_MODEL_ONLY due to mixed vLLM version risk.
docs/runtime-compatibility.md documents the vLLM language_model_only compatibility matrix, RunPod string env semantics, and deployment gate checklist (startup + one inference).
README.md links to docs/runtime-compatibility.md for quick operator access.
tests_expected: python -c "import json; json.load(open('.runpod/hub.json')); json.load(open('aiwf.request.json')); print('json ok')"
rollback_plan: Immediate fork-local rollback is git revert of this hotfix commit to restore prior profile-default injection behavior, previous preset unset markers, and previous config_doctor checks/docs. If startup or inference regressions appear after deploy, switch endpoint image tag back to the last known-good fork release while revert image rebuild and redeploy complete.
deploy_plan: Deploy fork-only in a conservative staged rollout (1->2->4 workers). For each stage validate: cold start succeeds, worker accepts engine args without AsyncEngineArgs errors, and one representative inference request completes successfully before increasing traffic.
threat_model: Primary risks are silent incompatibility across mixed vLLM versions and invalid optional override values causing runtime instability. Mitigations: dataclass-field-gated profile defaults, explicit unset sentinel values in presets, static config_doctor guardrails, and documented startup/inference deployment gates.
